name: Radiant Vouirescence
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>契</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>珖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のヴルーレセンス
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned while your opponent controls a monster: You can discard 1 card; send any number of "Radiant Vouirescence" from your Deck to the GY. Once per turn, if this card is in your GY: You can make this card in the GY become DARK until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned while your opponent controls a monster: You can discard 1 card; send any number of "Radiant Vouirescence" from your Deck to the GY. Once per turn, if this card is in your GY: You can make this card in the GY become DARK until the end of this turn.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned while your opponent controls a monster: You can discard 1 card; send any number of "Radiant Vouirescence" from your Deck to the GY. Once per turn, if this card is in your GY: You can make this card in the GY become DARK until the end of this turn.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
